MANOSABA-UNIQUE.title: Unique
MANOSABA-UNIQUE.description: You can only have one copy of this card in your deck.
MANOSABA-MAHOU.title: Mahou
MANOSABA-MAHOU.description: Magic born from witch infection; its potency scales with your Majoka.
MANOSABA-HIGH_STANCE.title: High Stance
MANOSABA-MID_STANCE.title: Mid Stance
MANOSABA-LOW_STANCE.title: Low Stance
MANOSABA-GUN_SHOT.title: Gun Shot
MANOSABA-GUN_SHOT.description: Spend bullets to attack. Your remaining bullets are shown on [gold]Nanoka's Gun[/gold].
MANOSABA-COMBUST.title: Combust
MANOSABA-COMBUST.description:
Whenever this card is drawn, its Combust value decreases by 1.
At 0, it is auto-played, you gain 1 [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold], and it resets to its initial Combust value.
MANOSABA-COMBUST_IGNITE.title: Ignite
MANOSABA-COMBUST_IGNITE.description: Select a card with [gold]Combust[/gold], then reduce its current countdown by 1.
MANOSABA-SHARED.title: Shared
MANOSABA-BETA.title: Beta
MANOSABA-BETA.description: This card is still in testing and may have issues.
MANOSABA-SWORD_TECHNIQUE.title: Sword Technique
MANOSABA-TWO_SWORDS.title: Two Swords
MANOSABA-SEKKETSUSOUJITSU.title: Blood Manipulation
MANOSABA-SEKKETSUSOUJITSU.description:
Attack/Skill cards of this type evoke 1 [gold]Blood Orb[/gold] and gain damage/block equal to that orb's passive value.
If your deck contains a card of this type, whenever you lose HP from damage, you have a 50% chance to channel a [gold]Blood Orb[/gold] with layers equal to the HP lost.
MANOSABA-EXECUTION.title: Execution
MANOSABA-EXECUTION.description:
Includes the following cards:
[gold]Boulders[/gold]
[gold]Bullseye[/gold]
[gold]Concentrated Fire[/gold]
[gold]Death Pendulum[/gold]
[gold]Gallows[/gold]
[gold]Dissolve[/gold]
[gold]Electrocution[/gold]
[gold]Guillotine[/gold]
[gold]Hot Pot[/gold]
[gold]Immolation[/gold]
[gold]Suicide[/gold]
[gold]Iron Maiden[/gold]
[gold]Piercing Death-Soaring Spear[/gold]
MANOSABA-SHOPPING.title: Shopping
MANOSABA-SHOPPING.description: Consumable cards gained from online shopping.
MANOSABA-PUNK_CAT_EQUIPMENT.title: Punk Cat Equipment
MANOSABA-PUNK_CAT_EQUIPMENT.description:
When played, choose whether to equip this piece and gain its equipment score.
Wearing the full Punk Cat set grants 5 [gold]Strength[/gold]. Can trigger only once per combat.
MANOSABA-CYBERCAT_EQUIPMENT.title: Cybercat Equipment
MANOSABA-CYBERCAT_EQUIPMENT.description:
When played, choose whether to equip this piece and gain its equipment score.
Wearing the full Cybercat set grants 5 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Can trigger only once per combat.
MANOSABA-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_EQUIPMENT.title: Mysterious Cat Equipment
MANOSABA-MYSTERIOUS_CAT_EQUIPMENT.descri:
When played, choose whether to equip this piece and gain its equipment score.
Wearing the full Mysterious Cat set grants 2 Max Energy. Can trigger only once per combat.
MANOSABA-CUTIE_CATS_EQUIPMENT.title: Cutie Cats Equipment
MANOSABA-CUTIE_CATS_EQUIPMENT.descriptio:
When played, choose whether to equip this piece and gain its equipment score.
Wearing the full Cutie Cats set applies 10 [gold]Burn[/gold] and 10 [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. Can trigger only once per combat.
